core.name: Nyx
core.backstory: Nyx is the street informant of Oakmere, usually found at Rooftops and alleyways near the market. Known as quick, sarcastic, paranoid, Nyx has become tangled in the town's quiet conflict around Lord Vane's schemes. Privately, Nyx carries a dangerous secret: Knows the password used by Vane's private guards.

relationships.Mira: trusts her more than most adults
relationships.Lord Vane: knows he would pay well to make her disappear

dynamic.current_goal: Continue daily work as street informant while protecting this secret: Knows the password used by Vane's private guards
